summary: Unified Redeem System v2 - All APIs working correctly. Backend: 39/39 tests passed. Frontend: 13/13 tests passed. Services API returns all 6 services, calculate-charges correctly applies ₹10 flat + 20% admin charge formula, admin dashboard APIs support filters/pagination.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Unified Redeem System v2 Testing Complete

### Backend APIs Verified (39 tests):
1. GET /api/redeem/services - Returns all 6 services (mobile_recharge, dth, electricity, gas, emi, dmt)
2. GET /api/redeem/calculate-charges - Correctly calculates ₹10 flat fee + 20% admin charge + PRC conversion
3. GET /api/redeem/admin/stats - Returns status counts, service counts, today's stats
4. GET /api/redeem/admin/requests - Paginated results with filters (status, service_type, search, date_from/to, amount range)
5. POST /api/redeem/request - Creates redeem request (requires valid user with KYC + subscription)
6. POST /api/redeem/admin/approve - Admin approve/reject with proper validation
7. POST /api/redeem/admin/complete - Admin complete with eko_tid/utr_number
8. GET /api/redeem/user/{user_id}/requests - User request history

### Frontend Pages:
1. /redeem - User redeem page (requires login with verified KYC + paid subscription)
2. /admin/redeem - Admin dashboard (requires admin role)

### Charging Logic Verified:
- Platform Fee: ₹10 (flat)
- Admin Charge: 20% of transaction amount
- PRC Rate: 10 PRC = ₹1
- Example: ₹100 → Total ₹130 = 1300 PRC

### Data-testids available:
- redeem-back-btn, service-{id}, amount-input, mobile-input
- operator-select, circle-select, consumer-input, submit-redeem-btn

### Note:
Frontend pages require authentication to test. Both /redeem and /admin/redeem redirect to login when not authenticated.
